summary: The diff attempts to revert the application toward Version 9 but shows several indicators of post-Version 9 features still present (OTP flows, refund management, seller management references), and several animation/UI components that may not belong to Version 9. Additionally, no files were removed in the diff despite the requirement to delete all later-version additions, and the backend still contains OTP storage logic which is explicitly called out as a post-Version 9 feature in the non-goals.

missing_requirements.requirement: All pages and features added after Version 9 are removed.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows zero removed files. Post-Version 9 features remain: AdminRefundsPage is still imported and routed in App.tsx, and the /admin/refunds route is present in AdminLayout.tsx nav items. Refund management is explicitly listed as a post-Version 9 feature that should be removed.

missing_requirements.requirement: The backend actor reflects only the data models and functions present in Version 9. No OTP flows should be present if they were added post-Version 9.
missing_requirements.reason: The backend/main.mo still contains a full OTP storage implementation (generateOtp, verifyOtp, generateRandomOtp, formatOtp, otpStore) which is explicitly listed as a post-Version 9 feature in the non-goals ('OTP flows' should not be preserved unless present in Version 9).

missing_requirements.requirement: No code, styles, animations, or data model changes introduced after Version 9 are present.
missing_requirements.reason: Several animation/enhancement components (AnimatedCheckmark.tsx, ConfettiEffect.tsx, FloatingShapes.tsx, ScrambledText.tsx, AnnouncementTicker.tsx, FrostedToast.tsx, MobileBottomNav.tsx) remain modified in the diff but are not removed, suggesting post-Version 9 animation and design enhancements may still be present.

missing_requirements.requirement: Seller management features added post-Version 9 are removed.
missing_requirements.reason: The Header.tsx still contains a 'Seller Portal' button referencing seller management. SellerLayout.tsx also remains modified in the diff. If these were not present in Version 9, they should be removed.

hallucinated_features.description: OTP storage and verification system in backend (generateOtp, verifyOtp, otpStore)
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request explicitly lists 'OTP flows' as a non-goal and post-Version 9 feature that should not be preserved. The backend still includes a full OTP implementation.

hallucinated_features.description: AdminRefundsPage route and navigation item in the admin panel
hallucinated_features.reason: Refund management is explicitly listed in the non-goals as a post-Version 9 feature. It appears to have been retained rather than removed.

hallucinated_features.description: Seller Portal button in Header.tsx and SellerLayout.tsx component
hallucinated_features.reason: Seller management is listed as a post-Version 9 non-goal. The Header still shows a 'Seller Portal' button and SellerLayout.tsx remains in the codebase.
